name: exact phrasing lands
transcript: I'd do it again. She's crew.

choices: I'd do it again — she's crew.

name: the drink order finds the drink

choices: I'd do it again — she's crew.

name: casing and punctuation are invisible
choices: I'd do it again — she's crew.

name: free speech matches nothing

choices: I'd do it again — she's crew.

name: all stopwords carry no intent

name: no choices offered means no match
landing between two choices is ambiguity, not a match

name: single strong content word against short choices
verbed paraphrase without shared nouns misses
stopword padding does not drown the signal

name: close but clearly second choice wins by margin
shared verb between choices is not enough
one-word yes with a yes-shaped choice
